intent: 实现 Fabric multi-store/sync 接线(global-refactor 北极星首个落地里程碑)+ 修 F-MATURITY-ENDORSED schema vocab bug。新 worktree feat/multistore-wiring 完成。

context.exec_policy: 主线串行 Edit/Write/Bash 实现, 不 spawn per-task agent; delegate 仅末尾一次 batch review (feedback_agent_review_efficiency C)

in_scope: 读侧接线: recall/meta 跨 mounted store 聚合; read-set = required_stores ∪ personal
写侧接线: 写知识路径写进 mounted store(消费 shared/src/store/core.ts readKnowledgeAcrossStores/listStoreKnowledge 等)
sync push 接线: run-sync.ts 实现 git push + offline defer (F-SYNC-NOPUSH)
store-remote 接线: storeCreate git remote add + store list 真 git remote 标签 (F-SYNC-REMOTE + F14)
F-MATURITY-ENDORSED: maturity 'endorsed' config vocab ⊥ schema enum 对齐
out_of_scope: 堆 B: lifecycle 可观测性新架构 (lifecycle-concept-final.md §3-§8, 8 hook 终态/telemetry/cite拆分/graph闭环/物理隔离) → 留后续 goal
F-NARROW-BUDGET injection 优先级重设计 → 留后续 goal
性能优化 / 重构 / 美学 polish
constraints: KT-DEC-0003 dual-root(~/.fabric + repo/.fabric)+ store⊥scope 平行 git 模型; store identity=intrinsic UUID
改任何文件前先 fab_recall 该文件
改 packages/shared/src/schemas/ 后必须 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build(否则 runtime invalid_union_discriminator)
回归门: shared+server+cli vitest 全绿(基线 2232 passed)
release 前本地 pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit(CI tsc 比 local build 严)
每 wave 收口 git commit(中文 commit message)+ sha 回填 git_commits[]
改前 grep 验证声称(防 reimplemented-noop)

execution_criteria: 每改文件前 fab_recall 该文件 + grep 验证 finding 声称仍成立
改 shared schema 后 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build
每个 wave 收口: shared+server+cli vitest 全绿(≥2232) + git commit(中文) + sha 回填
multi-store 必须实证 round-trip(写入 store→另一来源 recall 命中); sync push 必须实证 remote 真更新
只动 in_scope; 堆 B / F-NARROW-BUDGET 不碰; 越界即停报告

task_decomposition.subject: 读侧接线: recall/meta 跨 mounted store 聚合(read-set = required_stores ∪ personal)
task_decomposition.done_when: server recall 路径 import store 层 + loadGlobalConfig; recall(pcf) 能返回 mounted team store 条目(非仅 9 条项目自有); vitest 加覆盖

progress.done: 完成(commit cc4f243 前置 + f0ec45f 读侧): cross-store-recall.ts 自解析 read-set 跨 store 聚合候选; plan-context 拼接; store-qualified id; 实证 3/3(team:KT-DEC-9001 真冒/非required不冒/无gc降级); server 776 passed
next_plan_FINAL_SPEC: STEP1 export 复用纯函数: packages/server/src/services/knowledge-meta-builder.ts 给 extractRuleDescription(source):RuleDescription|undefined (L1002) + deriveRuleIdentity(file,source,existing):RuleIdentity (L922) 加 export

STEP2 新模块 packages/server/src/services/cross-store-recall.ts 导出 async buildCrossStoreRawItems(projectRoot): Promise<RuleDescriptionIndexItem[]> — 走 Path A 自解析(不依赖 bindings-snapshot, 因 install 不写 project_id=F9, 快照未接线): (a) const gc=loadGlobalConfig() (from @fenglimg/fabric-shared); 若 null→return []; (b) 读项目 .fabric/fabric-config.json 的 required_stores[](注意是 .fabric/fabric-config.json 非 root fabric.config.json, 仿 readConflictLintThreshold L220 的读法); (c) const rs=createStoreResolver().resolveReadSet({uid:gc.uid, mountedStores:gc.stores.map(...writable??true,personal??false), requiredStores:required_stores??[], }); (d) rs.stores.map→MountedStoreDir{store_uuid,alias,dir:join(resolveGlobalRoot(),storeRelativePath(store_uuid))}; (e) readKnowledgeAcrossStores(dirs) →StoreKnowledgeRef[]; (f) 每 ref: readFileSync→extractRuleDescription→若 undefined skip; stable_id=deriveRuleIdentity(...).stableId; **store-qualified id = `${ref.alias}:${stableId}`**(cite-line-parser 已支持 alias:id, 且 dedupeDescriptionIndex 按 stable_id 去重→与项目 id 天然不撞, 兼 S61 anti-shadow); knowledge_layer='team'(store=team 默认, personal store 条目可按 gc personal 标 'personal'); 建 {stable_id, description:{...desc, knowledge_layer}}

STEP3 wire: plan-context.ts:340 之后 `const storeItems = await buildCrossStoreRawItems(projectRoot).catch(()=>[]);` (best-effort, hot-path 不可崩, 仿 readEmbedConfig try/catch); `const allRawItems = [...projectRawItems, ...storeItems];` 改 L340 解构名后拼接, 让 store 条目走 layer-filter/docTexts/BM25/sort/dedup/topK 同一管线

STEP4 test: packages/server/__tests__/.../cross-store-recall.test.ts — FABRIC_HOME 隔离造 ~/.fabric/fabric-global.json(uid+1 mounted team store uuid)+ ~/.fabric/stores/<uuid>/knowledge/decisions/KT-DEC-9001.md(带 frontmatter)+ 项目 .fabric/fabric-config.json required_stores 引用该 store → planContext(projectRoot) candidates 含 `<alias>:KT-DEC-9001`; 另测 gc=null→[]; required_stores 空→只 personal
STEP5 全回归 + commit; round-trip 与 W1-T2(写侧)合并实证(写进 store→recall 命中)

关键约束已勘定: meta-builder 硬编码 <root>/.fabric/ 不能 per-store 复用 buildKnowledgeMeta(只复用 extract/derive 纯函数); store .gitignore 排 agents.meta(无预建索引, 必现建); RuleDescriptionIndexItem={stable_id,description} 仅两字段(provenance 靠 alias:id 前缀承载); buildCrossStoreRawItems 必须 best-effort try/catch(plan_context hot path)
